message:
feat(ftui-web): add deterministic session record/replay (bd-lff4p.3.7)

Implement SessionRecorder and replay() for recording WASM sessions and
replaying them with frame-level checksum verification. Follows the
golden-trace-v1 schema: Header, Input, Resize, Tick, Frame (with
FNV-1a checksums and chain), Summary. 24 tests covering record/replay
round-trip, mismatch detection, resize, mouse/paste/focus events,
checksum chain integrity, and error cases. Compiles for wasm32.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
